title: General Practitioner — Family Medicine
descriptionMd: An established Aster Clinic location is looking for a DHA-licensed GP to join its family-medicine practice. Patient panel skews working-age expat with a good mix of paediatric and elderly walk-ins. Rotating shift coverage with one weekday off; weekend coverage shared across the team.
requirementsMd: DHA-eligible licence (Dataflow + Prometric pass on file or in process). Minimum 3 years GP experience, ideally including UAE or GCC. English fluency required; Arabic, Hindi, Malayalam or Tagalog a strong plus.
benefitsMd: Resident visa sponsorship for self plus dependents, annual flight allowance, malpractice indemnity, and a clinic-funded CME budget.

title: Registered Nurse — ICU
descriptionMd: Critical-care nursing role in a 24/7 adult ICU running ECMO, CRRT and IABP cases. The unit pairs senior charge nurses with new-to-Magnet RNs and runs a structured 12-week unit orientation.
requirementsMd: BSN. DOH-eligible RN licence — Dataflow Verified + Prometric pass required. 2+ years ICU experience. BLS, ACLS current. ECCO course completion preferred.
benefitsMd: Fully expensed accommodation, family flight allowance, schooling support, DOH licence reimbursement, and pension-style end-of-service gratuity.

title: Specialist Orthodontist
descriptionMd: Mature dental group is opening a new orthodontics chair at its Jumeirah location. Existing referral pipeline from in-group GP dentists generates a steady book of Invisalign and ceramic-bracket cases.
requirementsMd: DHA Specialist Orthodontist licence. Minimum 4 years post-specialisation experience. Comfortable across paediatric, teen and adult ortho. Invisalign certification strongly preferred.
benefitsMd: Production-share package (base + percentage on net collections), residence visa, annual leave with airfare, and a yearly conference allowance.

title: Pharmacist (Community)
descriptionMd: Sharjah branch of Life Pharmacy is hiring a community pharmacist for a busy Al Nahda location. Walk-in counselling, OTC management, prescription dispensing across DHA and MOHAP-issued prescriptions, and insurance-claim handling.
requirementsMd: MOHAP-eligible pharmacist licence. B.Pharm minimum, Pharm.D preferred. 2+ years UAE community-pharmacy experience preferred but not required.
benefitsMd: Standard MOHAP-licensee package — visa, medical insurance, annual leave, end-of-service gratuity.

title: Physiotherapist — Outpatient Musculoskeletal
descriptionMd: Sports-physio clinic in Dubai Healthcare City is hiring a musculoskeletal-track physiotherapist. Caseload is roughly 60% sports/MSK, 30% post-surgical rehab, 10% paediatric.
requirementsMd: DHA-eligible physiotherapy licence. Bachelor's or DPT in physiotherapy. 3+ years clinical experience. Strong manual-therapy and exercise-prescription skills required.
benefitsMd: Visa, insurance, annual leave, CPD allowance, and a co-funded mentorship structure under the clinic's senior physios.

title: Medical Lab Technician
descriptionMd: Hospital lab in Khalifa City is hiring a Medical Lab Technician for hematology, chemistry and urinalysis benches with rotating evening shifts.
requirementsMd: DOH-eligible medical lab technician licence. Bachelor's or 3-year diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology. 1+ year hospital-lab experience preferred.

title: Radiology Technologist (X-Ray + CT)
descriptionMd: Multi-modality imaging department is hiring an X-ray and CT technologist for daytime + on-call rotations. Modern Siemens CT, Carestream DR and a Toshiba C-arm.
requirementsMd: MOHAP-eligible radiology-technologist licence. Bachelor's or 3-year diploma in Medical Imaging. Strong CT positioning and dose-management skills.

title: Sonographer (OB/GYN + General)
descriptionMd: Tertiary hospital women's-health programme is hiring a sonographer for OB, GYN and abdominal scan workload.
requirementsMd: DHA-eligible sonographer licence. Bachelor's in Diagnostic Medical Sonography or equivalent. 4+ years experience including 2nd / 3rd trimester OB scanning.

title: Phlebotomist
descriptionMd: Lab-collection role across a Dubai-based diagnostic-lab network. Mix of in-clinic and home-collection rotations.
requirementsMd: DHA-eligible phlebotomy licence. Diploma or certificate in phlebotomy. 1+ year experience preferred. UAE driving licence a plus for home-collection rotations.

title: Medical Coder (CPC)
descriptionMd: Group-revenue-cycle team is hiring a CPC-credentialed medical coder for outpatient encounters across multiple specialties. Charge-capture audit responsibility on top of routine coding.
requirementsMd: Active CPC (AAPC) credential — CCS-P or equivalent acceptable. 3+ years UAE coding experience preferred (Daman, DHA Sehaty and ADEK panels). Strong ICD-10 + CPT working knowledge.

title: Insurance Coordinator
descriptionMd: Insurance-coordinator role for a multi-specialty clinic — pre-authorisations, direct-billing escalations, claim resubmissions and end-of-month reconciliation with a panel of 12+ insurers.
requirementsMd: 2+ years UAE insurance-coordination experience. Working knowledge of Daman, ADNIC, Thiqa, Saada, MetLife, Cigna, Bupa Global. Comfortable across DHPO and Shafafiya submission portals.

title: Midwife
descriptionMd: Midwifery role at one of the UAE's largest maternity hospitals. Antenatal, intrapartum and postnatal coverage, including water-birth and active-birth pathways.
requirementsMd: BSc / Diploma in Midwifery. DHA-eligible licence. 5+ years midwifery experience. ALSO and NRP current.

title: Clinic Manager — Multi-Specialty
descriptionMd: Operations manager for a multi-specialty Medcare branch. Owns clinic P&L, staffing, DHA audit-readiness and cross-specialty patient-flow improvements.
requirementsMd: 5+ years UAE healthcare operations experience. Working knowledge of DHA licensing, JCI quality standards, and clinic-EMR systems (preferably InstaHMS or Bayanaty).

title: Compliance Officer (DOH + DHA + MOHAP)
descriptionMd: Group-compliance role spanning DOH-, DHA- and MOHAP-licensed facilities. Audit prep, licence renewals, JCI accreditation cycle support, and policy library upkeep.
requirementsMd: 5+ years UAE-regulator-facing compliance experience. Familiarity with DOH Tasneef, DHA Shabaak portals. JCI internal-auditor certification preferred.

title: Speech & Language Therapist (Paediatric)
externalClinicName: Camali Clinic Children & Adult Mental Health
descriptionMd: Paediatric SLT role in a long-established children's-mental-health and developmental-paediatrics clinic.
requirementsMd: MOHAP-eligible SLT licence. Bachelor's / Master's in Speech & Language Pathology. PROMPT or Hanen training preferred. Bilingual EN+AR a major plus.

title: OR Technician
descriptionMd: Surgical-tech role across a 5-OR suite. Mix of orthopaedic, general-surgery, ENT and ophthalmology cases.
requirementsMd: DHA-eligible OR / surgical-technician licence. Diploma in Operation Theatre Technology. 3+ years OR experience.

title: Anaesthesia Technician
descriptionMd: Anaesthesia-tech role supporting a large public-sector hospital OR programme.
requirementsMd: DOH-eligible anaesthesia-technician licence. Diploma in Anaesthesia Technology or equivalent. 2+ years experience.

title: Pharmacy Technician
descriptionMd: Assistant pharmacist role in an Aster pharmacy branch in Ajman. Dispensing support, stock management and front-counter customer service.
requirementsMd: MOHAP-eligible pharmacy-technician licence. Diploma in Pharmacy. Friendly customer-facing manner; English required, Arabic a plus.

title: Clinical Psychologist (Adult + Couples)
descriptionMd: Established mental-health clinic in Jumeirah is hiring an adult-focused clinical psychologist with comfort across CBT, ACT and couples therapy.
requirementsMd: DHA-eligible clinical psychologist licence. Doctorate (PsyD / PhD) or Master's plus supervision hours acceptable. 3+ years post-qualification experience.

title: Patient Coordinator
descriptionMd: Patient-experience role across a multi-specialty hospital outpatient programme. Pathway navigation for international patients and corporate-account holders.
requirementsMd: Bachelor's degree. 2+ years patient-experience or hospitality experience. English and Arabic strongly preferred.

title: Dental Hygienist
descriptionMd: Hygienist role across a single-clinic premium-cosmetic dental practice. Mix of routine prophy, scaling, and cosmetic-prep cases.
requirementsMd: DHA-eligible hygienist licence. Diploma or Bachelor's in Dental Hygiene. 2+ years post-qualification experience.

title: Dental Assistant
descriptionMd: Chairside assistant role at a Sharjah dental practice. Sterilisation, four-handed dentistry, patient prep and post-op instructions.
requirementsMd: Diploma in Dental Assisting. 1+ year experience preferred. DHA / MOHAP assistant-class licence preferred but not required (will support licensure).

title: School Nurse
descriptionMd: School nurse role at a large KHDA-licensed K-12 school. Routine wellness visits, first-aid response, immunisation tracking and parent liaison.
requirementsMd: DHA-eligible RN licence. Paediatric or school-nursing experience preferred. BLS current.

title: Home Care Nurse
descriptionMd: Visiting-nurse role across a Dubai home-healthcare programme. Wound care, IV infusions, post-acute monitoring, paediatric and geriatric visits.
requirementsMd: DHA-eligible RN licence. UAE driving licence required. 2+ years home-healthcare or hospital experience.

title: Occupational Therapist (Paediatric)
externalClinicName: American Center for Psychiatry and Neurology
descriptionMd: Paediatric OT role across a developmental-paediatrics programme. Sensory integration, feeding therapy and school-readiness pathways.
requirementsMd: DOH-eligible OT licence. Bachelor's or Master's in Occupational Therapy. SIPT-certified preferred.

title: Audiologist (ENT-attached)
descriptionMd: Audiology role across an ENT-attached hearing centre. Diagnostic audiometry, tinnitus assessment and hearing-aid fitting.
requirementsMd: DHA-eligible audiology licence. Master's in Audiology. 3+ years experience.

title: Consultant Cardiologist
descriptionMd: Consultant cardiology role spanning interventional and non-invasive practice — outpatient clinic, inpatient consults and on-call rotation.
requirementsMd: DOH consultant-grade licence. Board certification (American, European or Arab Board). 10+ years post-fellowship experience.

title: Medical Receptionist
descriptionMd: Front-desk role across a multi-specialty Dubai clinic — patient check-in, scheduling, insurance triage and reception phones.
requirementsMd: 1+ year receptionist experience (healthcare preferred). English fluency required, Arabic a major plus. Comfortable with Bayanaty / InstaHMS or similar EMR.

title: Medical Sales Representative — Pharma
descriptionMd: Pharma-rep role across Dubai-based clinic and hospital accounts. Specialty-medicine portfolio.
requirementsMd: Bachelor's in Pharmacy, Life Sciences or Medicine. 2+ years pharma-rep experience. UAE driving licence required.

title: Caregiver / Home Health Aide
descriptionMd: Home-care assistant role for elderly clients — daily-living support, medication reminders, companionship and basic mobility assistance.
requirementsMd: Caregiver / nursing-aide certification. Compassionate manner. UAE residency or willingness to relocate.
